data.body: Investigation complete. Root cause confirmed: resolve_hierarchy_link in ticket-graph.py had too-aggressive 'no shared ancestor' logic. When a task (orphan, no parent_id) linked to a story that has a parent epic, the algorithm walked BOTH chains to their roots — task (itself) and epic — resulting in REDIRECT: task→story promoted to task→epic. Fix: in the no-shared-ancestor case, only walk to roots when source_chain depth > 1 (source has ancestors). Orphan sources (depth=1) now keep both IDs as-is. Tests: test_resolve_hierarchy_link_orphan_task_to_story_sc7 + SC7b added to test_ticket_graph.py, confirmed RED before fix and GREEN after.
